prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: large green metal cube
  - obj_1: large purple metal cylinder
  - obj_2: small cyan metal cylinder
  - obj_3: small brown rubber cylinder
  - obj_4: small purple metal sphere
  - obj_5: large brown metal cylinder
  - obj_6: large blue rubber cylinder
  - obj_7: large blue metal cylinder
  - obj_8: small gray metal sphere

Questions:
[qrr_0321] Compare the distance between obj_3 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0322] Compare the distance between obj_3 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >

[qrr_0329] Compare the distance between obj_3 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0330] Compare the distance between obj_3 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0331] Compare the distance between obj_3 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0332] Compare the distance between obj_3 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0333] Compare the distance between obj_3 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >

[qrr_0340] Compare the distance between obj_3 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >

- obj_0: large green metal cube

- obj_2 (cyan cylinder): center-left area
- obj_3 (brown rubber cylinder): front-center or small
- obj_4 (purple sphere): center area
- obj_5 (brown metal cylinder): front-right area
- obj_6 (blue rubber cylinder): right-front area
- obj_7 (blue metal cylinder): back or right area
- obj_8 (gray sphere): center-front area

- obj_3 (brown rubber) is small, in front area
- obj_4 (purple sphere) is in center
- obj_5 (brown metal) is large, front
- obj_6 (blue rubber) is right side

- obj_8 (gray sphere) is front-center
